message:
Running command: # NC_SYSTICK v1.1.0 is CORRECT (that's the new version). The resolved.json is fine.
# But LibreLane is STILL showing old paths. This means it's NOT reading our resolved.json.
# It's fully re-resolving from config.json + PDK on every invocation.
# The 8afc8346 hash must still be in config.json somewhere OR in the PDK itself.
# Check if any PDK-internal paths are hardcoded in config.json
grep "8afc8346" /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/config.json | wc -l

# Also check: does the PDK itself have a version file that maps to 8afc8346?
cat /nc/pdk/ciel/sky130/versions/0fe599b2afb6708d281543108caf8310912f54af/sky130A/libs.tech/openlane/sky130_fd_sc_hd/mux2_map.v 2>/dev/null | head -2 || echo "mux2_map exists: $(ls /nc/pdk/ciel/sky130/versions/0fe599b2afb6708d281543108caf8310912f54af/sky130A/libs.tech/openlane/sky130_fd_sc_hd/mux2_map.v 2>/dev/null || echo 'NOT FOUND')"
